title: Nuage Micellar Cleansing Water Vitamin C 200ml – Gently Removes Makeup, Cleanses & Hydrates Skin – Brightening Antioxidant Formula with Aloe Vera & Vitamin E – Suitable for All Skin Types – No Rinsing
features: Powerful Yet Gentle Makeup Removal: Nuage Micellar Cleansing Water is designed to gently lift away makeup, dirt, and oil from the skin without harsh scrubbing. Whether you're removing waterproof mascara or long-lasting foundation, this formula effortlessly cleanses your skin while maintaining its natural balance, making it perfect for daily use on even the most sensitive skin.

Vitamin C Enriched Formula for Radiant Skin: Infused with Vitamin C, a powerful antioxidant, this micellar water helps to brighten and rejuvenate your complexion. It supports the natural regeneration of skin cells, reducing dullness and leaving your skin visibly brighter and healthier with every use.

Hydrating and Soothing with Aloe Vera & Vitamin E: The inclusion of Aloe Vera and Vitamin E adds an extra layer of care for your skin, providing deep hydration and soothing irritation. This makes the Nuage Micellar Cleansing Water ideal for those with dry or sensitive skin, helping to keep your skin soft, smooth, and refreshed.

No Need to Rinse – Perfect for On-the-Go Cleansing: Whether you're traveling or simply need a quick refresh, this no-rinse formula is perfect for when you're short on time. After using, your skin is left feeling fresh, without any greasy or sticky residue. Ideal for makeup removal at the end of the day or as part of your morning skincare routine.

Suitable for All Skin Types & Daily Use: This micellar water is dermatologically tested and safe for all skin types, including sensitive, dry, and oily skin. Free from harsh chemicals, it’s designed for daily use, ensuring that your skin stays healthy, hydrated, and glowing, no matter your skin type.
What’s Included: 200ml bottle of micellar cleansing water with Vitamin C, Aloe Vera, and Vitamin E.
description: Product Description Experience radiant, refreshed skin with Nuage Micellar Cleansing Water – a gentle yet powerful cleanser enriched with vitamin C, aloe vera, and vitamin E. Designed to lift away dirt, impurities, and make-up without the need to rinse, this multi-tasking skincare essential soothes and hydrates while helping to brighten and tone the skin. Perfect as a simple face wash or as part of a full beauty routine, this micellar water delivers effective results in just a few swipes, leaving skin clean, calm, and visibly refreshed. Whether you're removing stubborn mascara, wiping away daily grime, or freshening up on the go, this cleanser is a must-have in any skincare kit. Kind to all skin types and sized perfectly for travel, it's an ideal addition to everyday routines and holiday essentials for women who want effortless, effective cleansing at their fingertips. Ingredients Aqua, Phenoxyethanol, Glycerine, Polysorbate-20, Sodium Cocoamphoacetate, Panthenol, Propylene Glycol, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), Tetrasodium EDTA, Caprylyl Glycol, Citric Acid, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Extract, Tocopherol (Vitamin E) Acetate, Parfum, Anthemis Nobilis (Chamomile) Flower Extract, Benzoic Acid, Dehydroacetic Acid, Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, Limonene, Hydroxycitronellal. Directions Apply the cleansing water to a cotton pad and sweep across your face, paying special attention to the eye and lip area if you are removing make-up. No need to rinse.
